title: QS Stock Under Pressure As 2026 Loss Guidance Weighs On Bulls
text: QuantumScape (QS) stock declined 7.79% on May 15, 2026, trading in a range between $7.90 and $8.10. QS has been trading like a classic battleground story, with recent trading activity concentrated between $7.20 and $8.60. Key investor concerns: The company reaffirmed adjusted EBITDA losses of $250M–$275M for 2026, signaling continued unprofitability and heavy R&D spending without near-term earnings relief. Despite holding roughly $904.7M in cash and short-term investments, the company burned approximately $69.5M in free cash flow last quarter. This trajectory raises questions about how long the balance sheet can sustain operations. The article emphasizes concerns about solid-state battery commercialization timeline, suggesting investors worry the company may miss expected development milestones. The stock exhibits yo-yo price patterns driven by headlines rather than fundamental cash flow improvements, making it a speculative trading vehicle rather than a stable investment.
